Review Content: Dual temperature was the selling feature of this unit. Instructions make it seem difficult to setup, but if you reword it like I did, a breeze to get up and running. I will be buying yet another one soon making my total count 3. Highly recommended.

I brew Kombucha and need the heating pad to maintain a 70-72 degree temperature. Most heating pads just have a low, medium, and high setting but when plugged into this unit I’m always within 1° of where I would like to be. Easy to set up, easy to use, and very accurate! I’m really happy with my purchase.

I have installed it for an electric water heater in my RV. The OEM control was a
snap action thermal switch with a large hysteresis on/off cycle (15-20) degrees.  I can now choose that parameter.  Additionally the temperature readout is very useful since the heater is turned off much of the time.  I have 
not programmed the on/off time yet but that is a useful feature.
Nice accurate unit, great features, easy to use. just wish I got the Wi-Fi unit. Thanks

I use to control a space heater in a small greenhouse. Orchids need a temperature difference between day and night to grow well and bloom. This unit provides day/night temperature controls that let me provide these conditions. I wish it was a more durable unit, but for the price I can't complain.

Pros: Inexpensive, gets the job done
Cons: Don't expect it to last more than a year

Controls temperature more accurately than typical heaters. I'm tired of buying expensive name brand heaters that last 3 years or less so giving this a go and so far it is working better than expected. I can set the tank to exactly what temp I want and it will stay there within 1 degree.

It works really well, the only thing I dislike about it is the instructions, it's difficult to set it by the way the instructions are written. It took me a while to get it set, never could set with the instructions. I just kept trying until I got it where I could get it set right.

I own several of these and use them in my workshop to control temps in my freezer wood kiln, I also use one to control the temperature in my low heat resin curing oven.  Once you get the hang of programming them they are great
The timer function is a little awkward. The overall function is good. It holds my tempera just fine. Easy to program. Easy to use.
This product has made my life easier. I use it to heat a homemade wood kiln. It is extremely accurate. Thank you
can be adjusted to be very accurate. Had one 4 years works great
